Uranus Fondness for anything new or novel. progress. refat'm.
He is therefore a reformer. inventor. and also in a negative
sense, a revolutionary and insurgent.
Neptune Susceptible. suggestible, with knowledge of human
nature. Hence an imaginative writer or actor. as well as a
swindler.
